title: How to properly get data from Wordpress
excerpt:

posts.author: thynkconsultinggroup (Alexa DAgostino)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Monday community!

I am struggling getting hooks to work with Zapier into Monday from a wordpress site. I have a basic form on the wordpress site and just trying to simply get the data into Monday. The issue is I do not have control of the admin so I can not set up an easy zapier and would have to set up the hook. But unfortantely, it’s not working and just sending me a long string of letters/numbers.

Anyone have an easier way to connect a hook into monday?

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi. I’m curious to learn why not replacing the wordpress from to w monday workform?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@thynkconsultinggroup

Personally, I prefer using Make over Zapier. You can read about why here: What is Make & How can it help you with monday?

However, to solve this specific situation, we would need more details.

Jim - The Monday Man
